title: Smart Fellowship Program
content: Event Date: 18th November 2024 The graduation ceremony of The Smart Fellowship workplace skills for the success, “an initiative by Nimaya was organized Galgotias University on the 18th Nov,2024. This program imparted immersive workplace skills to young women with big dreams to help them build automation proof careers. The Cofounder of Nimaya Navya Naveli Nanda and Samyak Chakrabarty, Ms. Aradhana Galgotia, Director Operations GU graced the occasion. This one-month intensive program empowered the ‘Smart Naris’ of GU and equipped with skills relevant in the 21st century such as critical thinking, creativity, collaborations, curiosity and communications. An excited learner from GU said that the soft skills training they received is very important in the era of A.I. These young learners who graduated were women student at the university between the age group of 21 to 30 and who are looking forward to learning skills required at the entry level and early career stages. Our Student, Ms. Srasti Bhardwaj added,” we realised that academic degrees and technical skills have to supplemented with soft skills, digital personal Brand Building abilities, emotional intelligence and this fellowship program gave us an insight into these” Case studies workplace simulations, Brain booster session with Industry leaders and workplace scenario-based judgement test made up which was 40 hours learning journey which was 80% action and 20% Gyaan. The students gained in confidence, learnt how to articulate their opinion, think smartly and leverage A.I for the smart outcomes. Event Outcome- A beautiful graduation ceremony showcased Navya’s commitment to empowering young women and gender equality which served as a powerful inspiration to all the young women graduated. Ms. Aradhana expressed her dedication for creating a meaningful change to develop a generation of bolder and braver young women with a desire to make a difference. Samyak spoke of his dream to create a more inclusive and equitable world. Mentor Name – Ms. Aradhana Galgotia Department Name – Department of Education
